projectDescription: High-performance distributed search engine combining BM25 keyword retrieval with semantic vector search
keyFeatures: Hybrid search combining BM25 keyword retrieval with semantic vector search
MiniLM embeddings via Ollama for semantic understanding
Consistent hash-based sharding for horizontal scalability
Memory-mapped vector storage for zero-copy reads
Per-shard HTTP servers with latency instrumentation
Fully containerized deployment with Docker Compose
publicApiSurface: POST /search - Execute hybrid search queries with BM25 and vector similarity
GET /health - Health check endpoint for monitoring
SearchRequest - Query parameters (query: string, top_k: int)
SearchResponse - Search results with hits array
SearchHit - Individual result (doc_id, score, shard_id, title, text)
Shard servers - Distributed search nodes on ports 9001-9004
Embedding API - MiniLM vector generation via Ollama
